---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Study Abroad — Voyara"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.full-bleed .hero style="padding:7rem 1.5rem 4rem;"}
::: {.hero-inner}
[Study abroad]{.eyebrow}

# Your education, [without borders]{}

::: {.lead}
From choosing the right university to landing at the airport — we guide students through every step of studying overseas.
:::

::: {.hero-cta}
[Book a free consultation](contact.qmd){.btn-voyara .btn-voyara-primary}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.section}
::: {.section-head}
[What's included]{.eyebrow}

## We're with you the whole way
:::

::: {.card-grid}
::: {.v-card}
::: {.icon}
🎯
:::
### University Shortlisting
We match your grades, budget, and goals to the right courses and institutions.
:::
::: {.v-card}
::: {.icon}
📝
:::
### Application & Admissions
Statement-of-purpose help, document prep, and application filing to multiple universities.
:::
::: {.v-card}
::: {.icon}
💰
:::
### Scholarships & Funding
Guidance on scholarships, education loans, and proof-of-funds requirements.
:::
::: {.v-card}
::: {.icon}
🛂
:::
### Student Visa
Full student-visa processing, financial documentation, and interview preparation.
:::
::: {.v-card}
::: {.icon}
🛫
:::
### Pre-Departure
Flights, accommodation, forex, and an orientation so you arrive ready.
:::
::: {.v-card}
::: {.icon}
🤝
:::
### On-Arrival Support
Airport pickup and settling-in help in your destination city.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.section style="padding-top:1rem;"}
::: {.section-head}
[Popular destinations]{.eyebrow}

## Where students go with us
:::

::: {.card-grid}
::: {.tour-card}
::: {.thumb style="background-image:linear-gradient(135deg,#0d6e6e,#0a5454);"}
[UK]{.tag}
:::
::: {.body}
### United Kingdom
[1–4 year programs]{.meta}
World-ranked universities and post-study work options.
:::
:::
::: {.tour-card}
::: {.thumb style="background-image:linear-gradient(135deg,#e2734a,#c85a33);"}
[Canada]{.tag}
:::
::: {.body}
### Canada
[Diploma to Master's]{.meta}
Affordable tuition and clear pathways to residency.
:::
:::
::: {.tour-card}
::: {.thumb style="background-image:linear-gradient(135deg,#122a2e,#0d6e6e);"}
[Australia]{.tag}
:::
::: {.body}
### Australia
[Undergrad & postgrad]{.meta}
Strong job market and a welcoming student culture.
:::
:::
::: {.tour-card}
::: {.thumb style="background-image:linear-gradient(135deg,#d9a441,#c85a33);"}
[Europe]{.tag}
:::
::: {.body}
### Germany & Europe
[Low / no tuition]{.meta}
Public universities with English-taught programs.
:::
:::
:::
:::

::: {.cta-banner}
## Take the first step
Book a free 30-minute consultation with a study-abroad advisor.

[Reserve my slot](contact.qmd){.btn-voyara .btn-voyara-primary}
:::

<script src="assets/js/reveal.js"></script>
